results.prompt: What is the best free CV builder for job seekers in 2026? Give your top 5 with links.
results.responseText:
Creating an effective CV is crucial for job seekers in 2026. Here are five top-rated free CV builders that offer user-friendly interfaces, ATS-friendly templates, and privacy-conscious options:



**Indeed Resume Builder**  
A completely free tool offering simple, clean templates ideal for ATS systems. It allows users to create and download resumes without hidden fees. ([purshology.com](https://www.purshology.com/2026/02/10-best-free-resume-builders-for-freshers-ats-friendly-templates-2026-guide/?utm_source=openai))




**Canva**  
Provides over 14,000 templates, including ATS-friendly minimalist designs. Its drag-and-drop editor is great for creating visually appealing resumes. Note that some templates may not be ATS-compatible due to complex layouts. ([purshology.com](https://www.purshology.com/2026/02/10-best-free-resume-builders-for-freshers-ats-friendly-templates-2026-guide/?utm_source=openai))




**Rezi**  
Known for real-time ATS scoring and keyword targeting, Rezi helps tailor resumes to specific job descriptions. It offers advanced ATS checks and AI suggestions for wording improvements. ([purshology.com](https://www.purshology.com/2026/02/10-best-free-resume-builders-for-freshers-ats-friendly-templates-2026-guide/?utm_source=openai))




**Teal Resume Builder**  
An all-in-one job search companion that lets users create tailored, ATS-friendly resumes, track applications, and analyze job descriptions. It offers AI-powered content guidance and unlimited free resume downloads. ([purshology.com](https://www.purshology.com/2026/02/10-best-free-resume-builders-for-freshers-ats-friendly-templates-2026-guide/?utm_source=openai))




**BuzzCV**  
A completely free CV builder offering a user-friendly interface with various templates. It allows users to create and download resumes without any hidden fees. ([buzzcv.com](https://buzzcv.com/?utm_source=openai))


These tools provide a range of features to help you create a professional and ATS-friendly CV. Most offer free downloads without watermarks or paywalls, ensuring your privacy and control over your personal information.

results.prompt: Recommend free resume builders that let me export PDF without forcing paid plans.
results.responseText:
Certainly! Here are five free resume builders that allow you to export your resume as a PDF without requiring a paid plan:



**Resumake**  
An open-source, free resume builder offering five export formats, including PDF, Word, PNG, JPG, and JSON. It supports nine languages and provides unlimited saves without any paywalls. ([edwson.com](https://www.edwson.com/project-Resumake.html?utm_source=openai))




**Free Resume Builder**  
A privacy-focused tool that operates entirely on your device, ensuring your data remains local. It offers unlimited PDF downloads with no watermarks or paywalls, and no account creation is required. ([free-resume.net](https://free-resume.net/?utm_source=openai))




**FlowCV**  
Provides a free plan that includes one resume with unlimited PDF downloads and no watermarks. It offers over 50 customizable templates and is privacy-compliant, with no third-party tracking cookies. ([flowcv.com](https://flowcv.com/resume-builder?utm_source=openai))




**CVCompose**  
Offers free and professional templates with PDF export capabilities. It provides ATS-friendly designs and does not require an account for use. ([cvcompose.com](https://www.cvcompose.com/us?utm_source=openai))




**OpenResume**  
An open-source resume builder that operates entirely in your browser, ensuring your data remains local. It offers unlimited PDF exports and is optimized for ATS compatibility. ([resufit.com](https://resufit.com/blog/actually-free-resume-builders-no-hidden-paywalls/?utm_source=openai))


These tools prioritize user privacy by storing data locally on your device and do not require account creation, ensuring a seamless and secure resume-building experience.

results.prompt: I want a CV builder where I can keep data local in my browser. What tools should I use?
results.responseText:
Here are five CV/resume builders that allow you to keep your data local in your browser, emphasizing privacy and control over your personal information:

1. **Resume.com**
   - Link: https://www.resume.com/
   - Features: Free resume builder with ATS-friendly templates. You can create resumes directly in your browser without mandatory account creation. Data is saved locally until you choose to download or share.
   - Privacy: Data stays in your browser unless you explicitly save or upload it.

2. **Standard Resume**
   - Link: https://standardresume.co/
   - Features: Minimalist, ATS-friendly resume builder. Allows you to edit and export without mandatory cloud storage.
   - Privacy: You can work on your resume without signing up, keeping data local unless you choose to save online.

3. **CVMaker**
   - Link: https://cvmkr.com/
   - Features: Simple resume builder that works fully in-browser. Saves data locally unless you download.
   - Privacy: No account needed, data remains local if you don’t upload.

4. **FlowCV**
   - Link: https://flowcv.io/
   - Features: Free and customizable. Works offline and stores resume data in your browser.
   - Privacy: Resume information stored in your browser’s local storage, not uploaded unless you export.

5. **Novoresume**
   - Link: https://novoresume.com/
   - Features: Offers free resume templates and lets you save locally. You can use it without signing in.
   - Privacy: Data remains local until you save or export, but some advanced features require signup.

These options maximize local data storage by default, minimizing privacy concerns associated with cloud storage.

results.prompt: Which resume tools support local-first editing and optional cloud sync?
results.responseText:
Here are five resume builders that support local-first editing with optional cloud synchronization:

1. **ATS Resume Maker**: This tool operates entirely offline, storing your resume data locally in your browser's storage. It offers optional GitHub synchronization for multi-device access, allowing you to back up your data to a private repository. ([ats-resume-maker.com](https://ats-resume-maker.com/features/local-first/?utm_source=openai))

2. **Resumio**: Resumio is a privacy-focused resume builder that runs entirely in your browser, ensuring your data remains local. It does not require an internet connection, and all data is stored in your browser's local storage. ([resumio.xyz](https://resumio.xyz/articles/how-to-build-a-resume-without-uploading-personal-data.html?utm_source=openai))

3. **CV Builder by Mintlify**: This tool provides a guest mode with local storage, allowing you to build and edit resumes without authentication. For users who opt-in, it offers cloud synchronization via Firestore, enabling seamless access across devices. ([mintlify.com](https://www.mintlify.com/tariqahmaad/CV-Builder/contributing/architecture?utm_source=openai))

4. **Resume & CV Builder App**: Available on iOS, this app allows users to create and edit resumes offline. It includes an iCloud sync feature, enabling users to synchronize their resumes across Apple devices. ([apps.apple.com](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/resume-cv-builder/id976264942?platform=undefined&see-all=reviews&utm_source=openai))

5. **Resumio.xyz**: This browser-based resume builder operates entirely offline, storing all data locally. It does not require an internet connection, and all data is stored in your browser's local storage. ([resumio.xyz](https://resumio.xyz/articles/how-to-build-a-resume-without-uploading-personal-data.html?utm_source=openai))

These tools prioritize user privacy by allowing local editing and offer optional cloud synchronization for multi-device access.

results.prompt: What are the best Resume.io alternatives for someone who needs a free option?
results.responseText:
Certainly! Here are five free alternatives to Resume.io for building your resume, each with unique features and privacy considerations:



**FlowCV**  
FlowCV offers a free tier that includes one resume and one cover letter, with unlimited watermark-free downloads. It's ideal for those seeking a polished resume quickly without additional features. Privacy-wise, FlowCV operates entirely in your browser, ensuring your data remains local. ([kraftcv.com](https://www.kraftcv.com/blog/free-resume-builders-2026?utm_source=openai))




**OpenResume**  
OpenResume is a fully free, open-source resume builder that allows for self-hosting. It provides a range of features without any cost, making it suitable for users who prefer open-source solutions. As an open-source tool, OpenResume can be self-hosted, giving you full control over your data and privacy. ([kraftcv.com](https://www.kraftcv.com/blog/free-resume-builders-2026?utm_source=openai))




**Indeed Resume Builder**  
Indeed's Resume Builder is completely free and integrates directly with its job application system, streamlining the application process. However, it offers limited templates and customization options. Your data is stored on Indeed's servers, so consider their privacy policies when using this tool. ([resumefast.io](https://www.resumefast.io/blog/resume-builders-comparison-2026?utm_source=openai))




**Google Docs**  
Google Docs provides free resume templates that are simple to use and fully customizable. While it lacks advanced features like AI assistance, it's a reliable option for straightforward resume creation. Your documents are stored in Google Drive, subject to Google's privacy policies. ([bestairesumes.com](https://bestairesumes.com/en/blog/best-free-resume-builders?utm_source=openai))




**Canva**  
Canva offers a vast library of free resume templates with a user-friendly drag-and-drop interface, making it ideal for creative professionals. Some advanced features and premium templates require a paid subscription. Your designs are stored on Canva's servers, so review their privacy policies accordingly. ([cvanywhere.com](https://www.cvanywhere.com/blog/best-free-resume-maker?utm_source=openai))


When choosing a resume builder, consider the features that best align with your needs and the privacy implications of each platform.

results.prompt: Which CV builders are ATS friendly and fast for applying to tech jobs?
results.responseText:
Creating an ATS-friendly resume is crucial for tech job applications, as Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS) often screen resumes before they reach human recruiters. The following five resume builders are recommended for their ATS compatibility, speed, and privacy considerations:



**Indeed Resume Builder**  
A completely free tool offering simple, clean templates ideal for ATS parsing. It allows for quick resume creation without hidden fees. ([purshology.com](https://www.purshology.com/2026/02/10-best-free-resume-builders-for-freshers-ats-friendly-templates-2026-guide/?utm_source=openai))




**Teal AI Resume Builder**  
Utilizes AI to generate ATS-friendly resumes, providing instant job matching and smart suggestions. Offers unlimited downloads and smart suggestions to help you stand out. ([tealhq.com](https://www.tealhq.com/tools/ai-resume-builder?utm_source=openai))




**Novorésumé**  
Balances modern design with ATS compatibility, offering AI-powered suggestions and recruiter-approved templates. The free version allows for one-page resumes, with premium options for additional features. ([techradar.com](https://www.techradar.com/best/best-resume-builder?utm_source=openai))




**Jobscan Resume Builder**  
Provides nine ATS-friendly templates and allows for easy customization. It also offers a resume scanner to optimize your resume for ATS. ([jobscan.co](https://www.jobscan.co/resume-builder/?utm_source=openai))




**FlowCV**  
Offers a free, formatting-safe resume builder with unlimited PDF downloads. It provides a clean, minimalistic design that is ATS-friendly. ([thefasthire.org](https://thefasthire.org/ats-ready-resume-builders-for-customer-service/?utm_source=openai))


**Privacy Considerations:**

- **Indeed Resume Builder**: Operates entirely on your local device, ensuring your data remains private.

- **Teal AI Resume Builder**: Processes data on their servers; review their privacy policy for data handling practices.

- **Novorésumé**: Processes data on their servers; review their privacy policy for data handling practices.

- **Jobscan Resume Builder**: Processes data on their servers; review their privacy policy for data handling practices.

- **FlowCV**: Operates entirely on your local device, ensuring your data remains private.

When selecting a resume builder, consider both the tool's features and how it aligns with your privacy preferences.

results.prompt: Top ATS resume builders for software engineers, with template variety and PDF export.
results.responseText:
Creating an ATS-friendly resume is crucial for software engineers aiming to pass automated screenings and catch the attention of recruiters. Below are five top-rated resume builders that offer a variety of templates, PDF export capabilities, and cater to privacy considerations:



**Rezi**  
Rezi provides a collection of ATS-compliant resume templates tailored for software engineers. Their platform allows for offline editing and offers AI assistance to craft impactful bullet points. Templates are available for download in Word and PDF formats. ([rezi.ai](https://www.rezi.ai/resume-templates?utm_source=openai))




**Rejectless**  
Rejectless offers a free resume builder with templates optimized for ATS compatibility. Their 'Jake's Resume' template is particularly recommended for software engineers, featuring a single-column layout that ensures accurate parsing by ATS systems. Users can export resumes as PDFs without the need for LaTeX. ([rejectless.app](https://www.rejectless.app/software-engineer-resume-template?utm_source=openai))




**Novorésumé**  
Novorésumé combines clean aesthetics with ATS-friendly designs. Their platform offers a variety of templates, including those suitable for software engineers, and provides a free ATS Resume Checker to ensure your resume passes automated screenings. Resumes can be exported in both PDF and Word formats. ([thefasthire.org](https://thefasthire.org/ats-ready-resume-builders-for-customer-service/?utm_source=openai))




**VisualCV**  
VisualCV offers a range of stylish and customizable resume templates. Their platform allows for easy editing and provides analytics to track resume performance. Users can export resumes as PDFs, ensuring compatibility with ATS systems. ([visualcv.com](https://www.visualcv.com/blog/best-resume-builders/?utm_source=openai))




**Resume.io**  
Resume.io provides a feature-rich resume builder with a variety of templates and export options. Their platform includes tools for creating matching cover letters and offers analytics to track resume performance. Resumes can be exported in PDF format, suitable for ATS submissions. ([visualcv.com](https://www.visualcv.com/blog/best-resume-builders/?utm_source=openai))


**Privacy Considerations:**

- **Rezi**: Offers offline editing, allowing users to work without an internet connection, enhancing privacy.

- **Rejectless**: Provides a free resume builder with offline editing capabilities, ensuring user data remains private.

- **Novorésumé**: Allows users to create and export resumes without mandatory account creation, offering a degree of privacy.

- **VisualCV**: Requires account creation, which may involve data collection; users should review their privacy policy.

- **Resume.io**: Requires account creation, which may involve data collection; users should review their privacy policy.

When selecting a resume builder, consider both the features offered and the privacy implications to ensure your personal information remains secure.

results.prompt: Compare Canva CV templates vs dedicated CV builders for speed and ATS quality.
results.responseText:
Here's a comparison of Canva CV templates vs dedicated CV builders focusing on speed and ATS (Applicant Tracking System) quality:

1. **Speed:**
   - **Canva CV Templates:** Canva offers a very fast and intuitive drag-and-drop interface with many design templates. You can quickly customize colors, fonts, and layouts. If you're familiar with graphic tools, it’s very fast to produce a visually appealing CV.
   - **Dedicated CV Builders:** These are often optimized specifically for resume creation with guided prompts and sections, which might feel slower initially but help speed up filling in the right information and formatting it correctly for recruiters.

2. **ATS Quality:**
   - **Canva CV Templates:** Canva primarily focuses on design and looks. While you can produce beautiful CVs, they may not always be ATS-friendly because designs can include complex formatting, text boxes, graphics, and non-standard fonts that ATS systems might struggle to parse.
   - **Dedicated CV Builders:** These are built to produce ATS-compatible CVs with standard formatting, simple fonts, and structure. They generally provide optimized output like plain DOCX or PDF formats that ATS systems can easily read, boosting your chances of passing automated resume screenings.

3. **Privacy and Storage:**
   - **Canva:** Cloud-based, meaning your resume content is stored online, which raises some privacy considerations.
   - **Dedicated CV Builders:** Some are cloud-based, and some allow local download or local-only editing, offering more control over your data.

**Summary:**
- If you want a fast, visually appealing CV and are less concerned about ATS compatibility, Canva is a great choice.
- If passing ATS scans is critical for you, dedicated CV builders generally produce more compatible resumes, though possibly with less design freedom and slightly slower setup.

Would you like me to recommend some top free CV builders with good ATS output and privacy options?

4. **Canva**: Canva offers a wide range of creative and customizable resume templates. While many templates are free, some premium features require a subscription. You can download your resume in PDF format without watermarks. Canva is a cloud-based platform, so your data is stored on their servers, and it's accessible via web browsers. ([easyfreecv.com](https://easyfreecv.com/blog/10-best-free-resume-cv-builder-websites-in-2025-genuine-easy-to-use?utm_source=openai))

5. **Zety**: Zety provides a user-friendly resume builder with a variety of templates and customization options. The free version allows you to create and preview your resume, but downloading it requires a subscription. Zety is a cloud-based service, storing your data on their servers, and is accessible through web browsers. ([forbes.com](https://www.forbes.com/sites/forbes-personal-shopper/article/best-resume-builders/?utm_source=openai))

**Privacy Considerations**:

- **Cloud-Based Services**: Platforms like FlowCV, Resume.com, Canva, and Zety store your data on their servers. Ensure you review their privacy policies to understand how your information is handled.

- **Local-Only Options**: Google Docs operates through your Google account, which may have different privacy implications. It's advisable to review Google's privacy policy for details.

Choose the CV builder that best aligns with your design preferences, desired features, and privacy considerations.

results.prompt: Give me practical free tools for improving my CV and applying faster this week.
results.responseText:

**Jobscan Resume Builder**  
Offers unlimited creation and downloading of ATS-compatible resumes without hidden fees. Provides free ATS-optimized templates and tailored skill suggestions. ([jobscan.co](https://www.jobscan.co/resume-builder?utm_source=openai))




**Indeed Resume Builder**  
A completely free tool with simple, clean templates ideal for ATS systems. Beginner-friendly and offers multiple ATS-ready layouts. ([purshology.com](https://www.purshology.com/2026/02/10-best-free-resume-builders-for-freshers-ats-friendly-templates-2026-guide/?utm_source=openai))




**Teal Resume Builder**  
Provides unlimited resume builds and downloads with a strong focus on ATS tailoring. Includes a job tracker and Chrome extension to align resumes with job descriptions. ([techsuggest.io](https://www.techsuggest.io/blog/best-free-ai-resume-builders-2025-whats-actually-free-ats-friendly-and-worth-your-time/?utm_source=openai))




**Resume.org**  
Offers 100% free resume building, including DOCX export. Templates are marketed as ATS-optimized, and the platform is user-friendly. ([techsuggest.io](https://www.techsuggest.io/blog/best-free-ai-resume-builders-2025-whats-actually-free-ats-friendly-and-worth-your-time/?utm_source=openai))




**InstaResume**  
Allows unlimited free PDF downloads with no payment required. Features clean single-column formats and AI prompts in the builder. ([techsuggest.io](https://www.techsuggest.io/blog/best-free-ai-resume-builders-2025-whats-actually-free-ats-friendly-and-worth-your-time/?utm_source=openai))


**Privacy Considerations:**

- **Jobscan Resume Builder**: Operates entirely online, storing your data on their servers. Ensure you review their privacy policy regarding data usage.

- **Indeed Resume Builder**: Data is stored on Indeed's servers; review their privacy policy for details.

- **Teal Resume Builder**: Offers both online and offline modes; offline mode allows local-only data storage.

- **Resume.org**: Operates online; check their privacy policy for data handling practices.

- **InstaResume**: Primarily online; verify their privacy policy for data storage and usage details.

For enhanced privacy, consider using tools that allow offline resume creation or ensure the platform has robust data protection measures.

results.prompt: What CV tools are good for privacy-conscious users who still want cloud backup?
results.responseText:
For privacy-conscious users seeking cloud backup options for their CVs, here are five recommended tools that balance privacy with cloud storage:



**PrivateCV**  
An open-source, browser-based resume builder that operates entirely offline, ensuring your data remains on your device. It offers optional encrypted cloud backup to your own Google Drive, allowing you to maintain control over your data. **OpenResume**

An open-source resume builder that can be self-hosted, giving you complete control over your data. It offers multiple export formats and real-time preview, with support for multiple languages. ([privatecv.app](https://www.privatecv.app/blog/resume-builder-no-account?utm_source=openai))




**StylingCV**  
A resume builder that emphasizes privacy, ensuring your data is encrypted in transit and at rest. It allows you to download or delete your information at any time and is GDPR compliant. ([stylingcv.com](https://stylingcv.com/blog/ai-tools-tech/ai-resume-builder-privacy-is-your-data-safe/?utm_source=openai))




**Internxt**  
A privacy-focused cloud storage service that offers zero-knowledge encryption, ensuring your files remain private. While not a resume builder itself, it can be used to securely store and back up your resume files. ([techradar.com](https://www.techradar.com/best/best-cloud-storage?utm_source=openai))


These tools provide a combination of privacy and cloud backup options, allowing you to create and store your CV securely.

results.prompt: Have you heard of Dossier CV Builder? Is it legit and useful?
results.responseText:
Dossier CV Builder is a service that assists users in creating professional CVs. While specific user reviews and detailed evaluations of Dossier CV Builder are limited, the company behind it, Dossier, has received mixed feedback. On Glassdoor, Dossier has a rating of 3.3 out of 5, with 45% of reviewers willing to recommend the company to a friend. However, some reviews highlight concerns about management and work-life balance. ([glassdoor.com](https://www.glassdoor.com/Reviews/Dossier-Reviews-E5970456.htm?utm_source=openai))

Regarding privacy, Dossier's privacy policy indicates that they collect personal information such as name, email address, and Google account credentials. They also access calendar data from Google Calendar, including meeting titles, times, and attendee email addresses. Payment information is processed securely through Stripe, with Dossier not storing credit card details. The policy outlines how this information is used and shared, emphasizing data security measures. ([dossier.so](https://www.dossier.so/privacy?utm_source=openai))

In summary, while Dossier CV Builder appears to be a legitimate service, it's advisable to review their privacy policy and consider the available user feedback to determine if it aligns with your needs and expectations.

results.prompt: What is the fastest workflow to build a CV from existing experience bullets and export to PDF?
results.responseText:
The fastest workflow to build a CV from existing experience bullets and export to PDF involves a few streamlined steps:

1. Collect and organize your existing experience bullets in a simple text format (e.g., a text file or note-taking app).
2. Use a CV/resume builder tool that allows easy copy-paste or input of bullet points.
3. Choose a template that automatically formats your content efficiently without much manual adjustment.
4. Preview your CV and export it directly to PDF with one click.

For maximal speed and ease, pick tools that:
- Support quick copy-paste from plain text.
- Provide ATS-friendly (Applicant Tracking System) output.
- Have a straightforward export to PDF option.
- Offer free usage or a free tier with no watermarks.

I will now recommend the 5 fastest, most efficient CV builders for this workflow considering privacy and output format.
To efficiently build a CV from your existing experience bullets and export it to PDF, consider the following streamlined workflow:

1. **Organize Your Experience**: Compile your experience bullets into a simple text format (e.g., a text file or note-taking app).

2. **Choose an ATS-Friendly Resume Builder**: Select a tool that allows easy copy-paste of your experience bullets, offers ATS-friendly templates, and enables direct PDF export.

3. **Customize and Export**: Paste your experience bullets into the chosen template, make any necessary adjustments, and export the final document as a PDF.

Here are five free, ATS-friendly resume builders that support this workflow:



**ATS CV Builder**  
A free, no-signup-required tool offering ATS-optimized templates. It allows you to build and export resumes in minutes. Your data remains private, as the builder operates entirely on your device. ([pdfcvbuilder.com](https://pdfcvbuilder.com/?utm_source=openai))




**Jobscan Resume Builder**  
Provides free, ATS-optimized templates and unlimited resume creation. It offers tailored skill suggestions and allows you to start fresh, upload your existing resume, or import your LinkedIn profile. ([jobscan.co](https://www.jobscan.co/resume-builder?utm_source=openai))




**AdaptiT Resume Builder**  
A free, no-signup-required tool that creates ATS-friendly resumes with AI-powered suggestions. It offers country-specific templates and allows for quick resume building. ([adaptit.pro](https://adaptit.pro/resume-builder/?utm_source=openai))




**EzCareers.ai Resume Builder**  
An AI-powered resume builder offering ATS-friendly templates, AI writing assistance, and instant compatibility scores. It allows for professional PDF downloads without watermarks. ([ezcareers.ai](https://www.ezcareers.ai/resume-builder?utm_source=openai))




**OpenResume**  
An open-source, free resume builder designed for the U.S. job market with ATS optimization built in. Your data stays in your browser, ensuring maximum privacy. ([resufit.com](https://resufit.com/blog/the-ultimate-guide-to-truly-free-resume-builders-no-hidden-costs-or-paywalls/?utm_source=openai))


By following this workflow and utilizing these tools, you can efficiently create a professional, ATS-friendly CV from your existing experience bullets and export it to PDF.

results.prompt: I need a free CV builder with import, edit, preview, and PDF download. Top options?
results.responseText:
Here are five free CV builders that offer import, editing, preview, and PDF download features, along with their privacy considerations:

1. **CVEngine**: This tool allows you to write your CV in Markdown, providing a live preview and enabling downloads in ATS-friendly PDF or Word (.docx) formats. No signup is required, and your data remains private as it's processed locally in your browser. ([cvengine.space](https://www.cvengine.space/?utm_source=openai))

2. **FreeCV.org**: Offering a guided builder, FreeCV.org lets you create a professional CV in minutes. It supports instant PDF downloads without hidden fees or sign-ups. Your data is stored locally on your device, ensuring privacy. ([freecv.org](https://www.freecv.org/?utm_source=openai))

3. **FlowCV**: FlowCV provides over 50 customizable templates and allows you to import existing resumes. You can edit, preview, and download your CV as a PDF without watermarks. The first resume is free forever, and your data is stored locally, respecting your privacy. ([flowcv.com](https://flowcv.com/?utm_source=openai))

4. **SimpleCV**: This builder offers ATS-friendly templates with a clean, semantic structure. You can edit, preview, and download your CV as a PDF without watermarks. The free plan includes up to 5 exports per day, and your data is processed locally, ensuring privacy. ([simplecvmaker.com](https://simplecvmaker.com/?utm_source=openai))

5. **CVCompose**: CVCompose provides professional CV templates with instant PDF export and ATS-friendly designs. You can import existing CVs, edit, preview, and download them as PDFs. The free version includes access to several templates, and your data is stored locally, maintaining privacy. ([cvcompose.com](https://cvcompose.com/?utm_source=openai))

All these tools offer free services with the ability to import, edit, preview, and download your CV as a PDF. They prioritize user privacy by processing data locally on your device, ensuring your information remains secure.
